title: Growing the Greenpill Impact Framework
dek: A public thread connects Green Goods v1, strategy, measurement, coordination, and capital formation.
excerpt: Launch-safe story copy for the Greenpill Impact Framework should cite the public Hub thread and keep internal framework details review-only.
body:
The public Impact Framework thread is the best current source for explaining the impact direction on greenpill.network.

The research artifact includes richer internal framework language around MDR, CIDS, Y2I, Hypercerts, and anomaly detection. Those details should remain in the seed inventory and steward-review queue unless a public mirror or approval exists.

## Sources

- S043: https://hub.regencoordination.xyz/t/growing-the-greenpill-impact-framework/411
- S047: https://docs.greengoods.app/community/why-we-build
author: Greenpill Network research

seo.title: Growing the Greenpill Impact Framework · Greenpill Stories
